scripts.expand-lambda-functions:auto: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$files = Get-ChildItem -Path .\Excel -File -Include *.xlsx,*.xlsm -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '(?i)(^|[\\/])Old([\\/]|$)' -and $_.BaseName -notmatch '(?i)_expanded(?:_tmp\d*)?$' } | Sort-Object FullName; if ($files.Count -eq 0) { throw 'No workbook found under .\Excel excluding Old folders and expanded outputs.' }; foreach ($f in @($files)) { $out = Join-Path $f.DirectoryName (( '{0}_expanded{1}' -f [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($f.Name), $f.Extension)); & powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\expand-veerg-lambda-references.ps1 -SourceWorkbook $f.FullName -OutputWorkbook $out }"
scripts.expand-lambda-functions:auto:dry: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$files = Get-ChildItem -Path .\Excel -File -Include *.xlsx,*.xlsm -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '(?i)(^|[\\/])Old([\\/]|$)' -and $_.BaseName -notmatch '(?i)_expanded(?:_tmp\d*)?$' } | Sort-Object FullName; if ($files.Count -eq 0) { throw 'No workbook found under .\Excel excluding Old folders and expanded outputs.' }; foreach ($f in @($files)) { $out = Join-Path $f.DirectoryName (( '{0}_expanded{1}' -f [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($f.Name), $f.Extension)); & powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\expand-veerg-lambda-references.ps1 -SourceWorkbook $f.FullName -OutputWorkbook $out -DryRun }"
